query_text: Plan a 3-day trip for 1 person from Detroit to Lexington from November 24th to November 26th, 2024, with a budget of $1,050.

properties.description: Part thoroughbred race course, part sales company and considered one of America's most beautiful tracks, Keeneland is known for its well-designed and meticulous landscaping. The grounds consist of the paddock, a prep area where visitors can view horses up-close just before the race and a combination of dirt and turf race tracks.
properties.rankingString: #4 of 173 things to do in Lexington
properties.name: Keeneland

properties.description: Discover the heart and soul of Kentucky’s beautiful Bluegrass horse country on this guided, 3-hour, small-group tour. Get a behind-the-scenes look at the thoroughbred horse lifestyle as you explore the famous Keeneland Race Course and one or more thoroughbred horse farms. Learn about the history of racing and how Lexington became the epicenter of thoroughbred breeding in the United States. Note: itinerary may change depending on availability.
properties.localName: Half-Day Thoroughbred Horse Farm Tour in Kentucky
properties.name: Half-Day Thoroughbred Horse Farm Tour in Kentucky

properties.description: Located in downtown Lexington, Kentucky. Join us for an intimate, educational and high caliber tour that includes the story of the historic Pepper Brand & Distillery, a tour of the working distillery and a tasting of our award-winning whiskeys. All tour guests receive a complimentary tasting glass and groups are limited in size for an optimal experience. Adults 21+ $20; Young Adult 14-20 $10; Veterans $10; Active Military Free Tour; restricted to age 14 and above. Please check in for your tour at least 10 minutes prior to the start time!

properties.name: James E. Pepper Distillery

properties.description: Kentucky is renowned for its horse programs and farms, this is your chance to see the prestigious facilities up close. Tour area horse farms—some that are usually closed to the public—to get a look at the work that goes into raising and caring for thoroughbreds. The tour includes time to meet and interact with the horses, maybe even feed them their favorite peppermint treats.
properties.localName: Unique Horse Farm Tours with Insider Access to Private Farms
properties.name: Unique Horse Farm Tours with Insider Access to Private Farms

properties.description: Get to know the charms of Lexington as you eat your way through the Kentucky city’s downtown on this walking food tour. You’ll learn all about the history and culture of the “Horse Capital of the World” as your guide shares insights about the landmarks you pass. The tour will make five stops and includes food ranging from traditional Kentucky specialties to modern innovations.
properties.name: Walking Food Tour Downtown Lexington

properties.description: Historical Tours and Charter Horse-drawn Carriages for Weddings, Festivals and All Special Occasions! Since 1985, Lexington Carriage Company (LCC) has offered an intriguing way for visitors to discover the rich history of Lexington. Slowed to the pace and rhythm of hoofbeats, our carriages travel through Lexington's unique historic residential and business districts while professional tour guides point out places of interest along the way. Tours begin across the street from the Lexington Visitor Center--open Thursday-Sunday from 11am-4pm; Private tour rentals available every day. LCC is also delighted to provide carriage services for weddings and other special occasions! Our wedding service will make your day a “Cinderella story” event when a white convertible carriage pulled by a team of matched horses arrives to take you to your wedding, or to whisk you away for a romantic newlywed ride together, before taking you to your reception.

properties.description: Blue Grass tours, Lexington's oldest tour company, provides full travel and touring services. Join us for a Private Tour. Our friendly, knowledgeable Tour Coordinators can create custom itineraries for your group or convention with tours, meals, and entertainment. Our engaging Guides will give you or your group a wonderful experience in the Bluegrass and beyond!
properties.name: Blue Grass Tours

properties.description: The only park of its kind in the world, the Kentucky Horse Park is a working horse farm, educational theme park and equine competition facility dedicated to man's relationship with the horse. Set on more than 1,200 acres in the heart of the Kentucky's famous Bluegrass region, the park is THE place to get close to horses! Featuring dozens of breeds of horse at work and at play, the park showcases the horse in daily equine presentations, horse drawn tours, horseback and pony rides, and an array of horse shows and special events throughout the year. The park's International Museum of the Horse, a Smithsonian Affiliate, is the world's largest equestrian museum. Offering both the experienced horseman and novice an opportunity to explore the many facets of humanity's relationship with the horse, the museum is dedicated to all breeds and disciplines of horse and covers some 50-million years of equine history. State-of-the-art technology complements rare artifacts and scholarly research to present a unique, educational, museum experience for all ages. The American Saddlebred Museum, the Showplace for Saddlebreds, celebrates Kentucky's first native breed of horse. The museum features interactive exhibits and a movie. With the park's own tourist activities and the numerous additional horse shows that take place in the equine competition facilities throughout the year, there can be a fair amount of walking involved, depending on visitor interest level. Comfortable shoes and clothing is recommended, appropriate for Kentucky's seasonal weather. Dogs and other pets are permitted on park grounds, as long as they are on a leash or in an approved carrier, although they may not be permitted in some buildings.
properties.rankingString: #9 of 173 things to do in Lexington
properties.name: Kentucky Horse Park

properties.description: Beer & Bourbon Tours with Tastings: The first era of the Lexington Brewing Co. began in the 1890s and came to a halt during Prohibition, changing ownership several times in the decades that followed. By the time Pearse Lyons and his son, Mark, explored the brewery in 1999, it was a dilapidated shell of what it had once been. However, Pearse was a visionary and entrepreneur and saw only what it could be. Spurred by a passion for brewing and distilling that course through the Lyons family lineage of Irish coopers, Pearse revived Lexington Brewing Co. and restored a craft beer tradition that dates back to the 1700s. Pearse continued to dream big as he set his sights on distilling — a natural progression given his background in fermentation, his family’s heritage and Kentucky’s bourbon tradition. No time for a tour, come in for a pint or cocktail and enjoy the patio.

properties.name: Red State BBQ
properties.description: At Red State BBQ, we are your neighborhood award-winning barbecue restaurant in Lexington, KY, where barbecue is done the right way. With every trip you take to our family-friendly restaurant, you can count on outstanding service, an inviting atmosphere, and, of course, the best-taking barbecue meals you ever sunk your teeth into. We're proud to serve premium-quality meats cooked to perfection from our years of experience. We use all original recipes and cook everything the best way we know how . . . low and slow. From our tempting barbecue meats, tantalizing appetizers and sides, to refreshing drinks and desserts, you're sure to be clamoring for more with every bite. Visit us today and ask about our catering and food truck.

properties.description: The best of Lexington. Malone's is Bluegrass Hospitality Group's original concept, Malone's is pleased to serve guests at three Lexington locations: Hamburg, Palomar and Lansdowne. Known for USDA Prime Beef, an extensive wine list and a relaxed atmosphere, Malone's is the perfect place for a business luncheon or family celebration. Enjoy a full service lunch or dinner, including rolled to order, fresh sushi from the Aqua sushi bar. Our diverse menu and over-the-top hospitality are sure to make Malone's your premiere dining destination.

We specialize in southern fare, fresh seasoned vegetables, homemade bread and offer a huge bourbon bar assortment. To satisfy your next craving, stop by Merrick Inn Restaurant in Lexington today!

properties.description: Bella Notte means Beautiful Night in Italian. Join us at our table & let us create your beautiful dining experience! This is a place to satisfy the appetite with Italian gusto. Enjoy the season's freshest ingredients and some unique dishes that are sure to become your next favorite! Remember, in Italy food & drink don't just make it possible to live, they're a part of what makes life worth living.Italians say, "A tavolo non s'invecchia". (People do not get old at the table)-spend enough time at ours and you'll believe it's true!
